title: Senior Software Engineer - PolicyBazaar Consulting Pvt Ltd - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - PolicyBazaar Consulting Pvt Ltd - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
PolicyBazaar Consulting Pvt Ltd, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Agra operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About PolicyBazaar Consulting Pvt Ltd:
PolicyBazaar Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PolicyBazaar Consulting Pvt Ltd!
